articles.title: Dhinchak pooja married or not? Check viral photos and videos that sparked wedding buzz
articles.description: Internet sensation Dhinchak Pooja has set social media abuzz with her bridal photos and videos. Fans are speculating if she has tied the knot or is teasing a new music project. The clips showcase mehendi, haldi, and sangeet ceremonies. Her posts hint at upcoming content on her YouTube and Facebook channels, leaving followers eager for more details.

articles.title: Is Lewis and Kim's romance getting serious?
articles.description: Formula 1 star Lewis Hamilton and businesswoman Kim Kardashian recently blended their families at Scott Disick's birthday bash. Kim arrived with her children, while Lewis was accompanied by his mother.

articles.title: Delhiwale: Rock star qawwal’s new innings
articles.description: Chand Nizami, 64, shifts from performing with his nephews to singing with his sons, introducing a new era in Delhi's qawwali scene.

articles.title: Horoscope Today: Astrological Predictions on May 28, 2026, For All Zodiac Signs
articles.description: Each zodiac sign has it's unique traits that shape their personalities & differentiate them from each other. Wouldn’t it be useful to start your day knowing what’s universe planned for you? Keep reading to see if today will bring good fortune your way.

articles.title: Pooja recalls Parveen giving interview about Big B wanting to kill her
articles.description: Pooja Bhattrecently reflected on the tragic final years of late actorParveen Babi, recalling her struggles with mental health, paranoia, and isolation. Speaking about Parveen’s emotional decline, Pooja remembered seeing her at theStardustoffice “giving a long interview about Amitabh Bachchan wanting to kill her” and said people were “enjoying the circus” instead of recognising her pain.

articles.title: “This is so stupid”: Candace Owens challenges Blake Neff over Charlie Kirk and Erika Kirk TPUSA successor claims
articles.description: Candace Owens and Blake Neff clashed again on X after Neff appeared to mock Owens’ possible presidential ambitions. Owens responded by demanding proof that Charlie Kirk appointed Erika Kirk as his successor at TPUSA. Their argument quickly spread online, with supporters from both sides reacting strongly. The controversy also renewed public debate around Erika Kirk’s growing role within Turning Point USA.

articles.title: Tom Hardy accused of keeping 'MobLand' co-stars Pierce Brosnan and Helen Mirren waiting for hours; refusing to leave trailer
articles.description: Tom Hardy's future on 'MobLand' is uncertain amid allegations of disruptive on-set behaviour. Reports suggest he kept veteran co-stars Pierce Brosnan and Helen Mirren waiting for hours, allegedly refusing to leave his trailer. While a final decision on his Season 3 involvement is pending, filming is slated for September. This follows past reports of Hardy attempting script alterations.

articles.title: Taylor Swift sends clear message amid wedding drama as Travis Kelce joins her for glamorous getaway
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce remain focused on their relationship despite growing attention surrounding their reported wedding plans. An anonymous guest recently criticized the event’s invitation policy, claiming some attendees were denied plus-ones. While the comments sparked discussion online, the couple has not responded publicly. Instead, they have continued making high-profile appearances together, including trips to London, Greece for George Karlaftis’ wedding, and an NBA playoff game.

articles.title: "Doubt she’s got anything left": Taylor Swift goes through major personal loss ahead of her wedding with Travis Kelce
articles.description: Taylor Swift experienced an unexpected setback after failing to secure any wins despite entering a major music event with the highest number of nominations. The outcome sparked widespread discussion among fans online, with some questioning the results while others argued the singer has already achieved more than enough success to cement her legacy. Meanwhile, supporters and critics continued debating the surprising development.

articles.title: Mike Vrabel shows love for wife and kids as Dianna Russini scandal swirls
articles.description: Mike Vrabel returned to Patriots media duties and spoke about his family after weeks of controversy.

articles.description: 15-day kids’ theatre workshop ‘The Voyage’ in Lucknow ends with three plays staged at Kaifi Azmi Academy; Doremi Club hosted at La Martinière College.

articles.title: When Priyamani confessed she had a crush on Shah Rukh Khan
articles.description: Back in 2023, actress Priyamani opened up about her memorable experience of reuniting with Shah Rukh Khan on the sets of Jawan after nearly a decade. In an exclusive interview with ETimes, the actress spoke candidly about working with SRK, her admiration for him, and how the superstar made her feel welcomed on set.

articles.title: Matthew Perry's Assistant Gets Over 3 Years In Jail In Actor's Death Case
articles.description: 'Friends' actor Matthew Perry, 58, was died in october 2023.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Bruno Mars: 'It's probably the worst feeling in the world, when you're deeply and madly in love with a woman and you know she's...' - Grammy-winning singer of 'That's What I Like' reveals pain of one-sided love, rejection and heartbreak
articles.description: Quote of the day by Bruno Mars: Bruno Mars' quote highlights the profound pain of unrequited love, where deep affection meets an unknown lack of reciprocation. This emotional imbalance leads to confusion, sadness, and a sense of helplessness. The experience underscores the universal human desire for mutual understanding and validation in relationships.

articles.title: Disclosure Day Final Trailer: Are Aliens Real? Steven Spielberg Answers With Emily Blunt, Josh O'Connor Starrer
articles.description: The final trailer of Disclosure Day is out! Offering a deeper look into Steven Spielberg’s mysterious alien thriller, it stars Emily Blunt and Josh O’Connor and explores government secrets, extraterrestrial life, and shocking connections from the characters’ pasts.

articles.description: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan’s Cannes 2026 BTS pictures by Harold James went viral, highlighting her pearlescent white power suit, dramatic boa, polished makeup, soft waves and timeless red carpet glamour.

articles.title: 8 places in the world that look AI-generated but exist in real life and and how to visit them
articles.description: Some places on Earth are so visually strange that they seem less like geography and more like something generated by an image prompt. Think of rainbow-striped mountains, mirror-like salt deserts and medieval islands that appear to float on water. Yet these landscapes are real, shaped by volcanoes, tides, minerals, erosion and, in some cases, human imagination itself.Here are 10 real places around the world that look almost too unreal to exist.Image Credit: Canva

articles.title: Missing The WONDERfools? Try These 7 K-Dramas With Superpower Plot That'll Charge You Up
articles.description: K-dramas have embraced the superhero genre, churning out shows where lead characters possess extraordinary power or strength. While recent hit, The WONDERfools, gave us a sumptuous dose, here are 7 more Korean titles to explore on OTT in similar space.

articles.title: Enola Holmes 3: Here’s when fans can watch new episodes on Netflix, release date, teaser twist and Sherlock’s shocking fate
articles.description: The Enola Holmes franchise has established a distinctive place among Netflix originals by combining mystery, humor and coming-of-age storytelling. Much of that popularity has been fueled by Millie Bobby Brown, whose lively performance transformed Enola into one of Netflix’s most recognizable young protagonists.

articles.title: ‘I asked God for death’: Honey Singh recalls battling bipolar disorder for 7 years
articles.description: Rapper Yo Yo Honey Singh has opened up about his battle with bipolar disorder and how spirituality helped him.

articles.title: David Harbour talks alternate ending ideas for Hopper in 'Stranger Things'
articles.description: David Harbour, who played Chief Hopper in 'Stranger Things', expressed a desire for more scenes with Eleven and Mike in the series finale. He also wished for a moment with Joe Keery's character, acknowledging that creative decisions dictated the story's conclusion. The cast and creators discussed the emotional impact of the final Dungeons and Dragons scene.

articles.title: The Family Man To Killer Soup: 6 Must-Watch Performances Of Governor Actor Manoj Bajpayee On OTT
articles.description: Manoj Bajpayee has appeared in over 70 films throughout his career. From delivering intense roles to appearing in light-hearted slice-of-life dramas, he remains a fan favourite. Here are six must watch films from his slate available on OTT.

articles.title: Alia Bhatt's Alpha 'leaked' pictures go viral
articles.description: An X account recently posted what it claimed were leaked pictures of Alia Bhatt, Sharvari and Bobby Deol from the sets of YRF's Alpha, sparking a storm online. The images, later AI-enhanced, remain unverified. Neither YRF nor the actors have responded. The film releases on July 10, 2026.

articles.title: Odisha Farmer Grows World's Most Expensive Mango Worth Rs 3 Lakh Per Kg, But Now He Has A Big Problem
articles.description: Miyazaki mangoes are usually large, weighing over 350 grams each.

articles.title: Poonam CLARIFIES CINTAA's stance on 'Don 3' controversy
articles.description: As the 'Don 3' controversy continues to grow, CINTAA President Poonam Dhillon has spoken out, expressing surprise that neither Ranveer Singh, Excel Entertainment, nor FWICE informed the association before the non-cooperation directive was issued. Dhillon believes the situation could have been resolved amicably had CINTAA been approached in time.

articles.description: Prashanth Neel says Jr NTR’s character in Dragon is far darker than anything he has ever written before.

articles.title: Kim Se-ui arrested over AI voice clone in Kim Soo-hyun case
articles.description: South Korean YouTuber Kim Se-ui of Hover Lab has been arrested for allegedly using AI to defame actor Kim Soo-hyun. Authorities claim Kim Se-ui falsely alleged Kim Soo-hyun dated the late Kim Sae-ron when she was a minor, using manipulated voice recordings and text messages. Kim Soo-hyun denies the claims, stating they dated only when she was an adult.

articles.title: 5 places on Earth where you can experience all four seasons in one road trip
articles.description: There are road trips, and then there are journeys which turn into lifetime experiences. Now these road trips are such where the weather becomes part of the adventure. Imagine beginning your drive amid a hot summer day, running into snow-capped mountain views by noon, crossing golden autumn forests in the next few hours and landing into spring blossoms the next day!

articles.title: ‘Spring fling bibidy bop’: Actor Madhavan amused by woman’s bizarre iced latte order. Husband’s reaction to wife’s request leaves social media in splits
articles.description: Actor R. Madhavan shared a funny video online. A wife ordered a made-up drink at a drive-through. Her husband tried to order it, confusing the barista. The wife eventually revealed it was a prank. The video has gained millions of views and delighted viewers with its humor and the husband's patience.

articles.title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai Makers Call Out Vashu Bhagnani Alleging 'Smear Campaign' Against Varun Dhawan Film
articles.description: Eying its release on June 5, Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai is buzzing the internet for all the wrong reasons. The producer and the music partner have released a statement against the allegations made about their rightful ownership.

articles.title: Ilaiyaraaja to compose for Mari Selvaraj’s next; Wait to experience this FIRST collaboration finally ends
articles.description: Legendary composer Ilaiyaraaja is set to collaborate with director Mari Selvaraj for his next film, marking their first-ever musical partnership. This highly anticipated project, reportedly based on a real-life incident, also reunites Mari Selvaraj with actor Kathir. The film promises to deliver emotionally charged music and a powerful narrative, continuing Selvaraj's tradition of highlighting the struggles of ordinary people.

articles.title: Quote of the day by "Marvel creator", Stan Lee : "If you have an idea that you think is good, don’t..."
articles.description: Know the real meaning behind Stan Lee’s famous quote about self-belief and creativity. Learn what “it” refers to and whether Stan Lee called everyone an idiot.

articles.description: Ram Charan’s Peddi has suffered a big setback ahead of its release, as the film’s much-awaited Japan premiere has now been postponed. Directed by Buchi Babu Sana, the film is a sport-drama with music by AR Rahman.

articles.title: Loved Off Campus? 5 Upcoming Prime Video Young Adult Shows That Are In The Pipeline
articles.description: Off Campus, the latest Prime Video show, has redefined the way the audience watches young adult content. In 2026, the streaming platform will be offering many more series in the genre. Take a look.

articles.title: Ella Bright defends age-gap criticism in 'Off Campus' show
articles.description: Nineteen-year-old Ella Bright, star of 'Off Campus', addressed concerns regarding her on-screen intimacy with co-star Belmont Cameli, who is nearly a decade older. Bright, who was 18 during filming, emphasized the supportive set environment and her strong, fast friendship with Cameli, highlighting their professional comfort and mutual respect throughout the demanding production.

articles.title: CM Vijay's first SOP for film industry: 5 shows a day in the opening week
articles.description: Earlier, theatres could screen up to four regular shows a day, while an additional special show was permitted during festivals and government holidays.

articles.description: Love Aaj Kal (2020), directed by Imtiaz Ali, was a critical and commercial failure. The romantic drama starred Sara Ali Khan, Kartik Aaryan, and Randeep Hooda.

articles.description: The upcoming project draws inspiration from the shocking murder of seven-year-old “Prince”, who was found with his throat slit inside the bathroom of an elite Gurugram school on September 8, 2017

articles.title: Why Is Vijay Called 'Thalapathy', Mammootty 'Mammukka'? Breaking Down South Stars' Iconic Nicknames
articles.description: Joseph Vijay is Thalapathy for his fans, while Mammootty is Mammookka to his admirers.

articles.title: Madhav Suresh explains Instagram disappearance
articles.description: Actor Madhav Suresh's Instagram account was temporarily suspended for violating community guidelines, a move he attributes to backlash over his film 'Angam Attahasam'. Suresh revealed the suspension after a public spat with a YouTube reviewer regarding negative film criticism. He also spoke out against online hate campaigns targeting filmmakers and his family, citing personal insults and a political connection.
